slides.title: Hands-on tutorial: Using the Github web interface for authoring Internet-Drafts

chat.author: Georgios Karagiannis
chat.text: the mentioned URL: Report from Chinese Youth Talent Program can be found via: https://wiki.ietf.org/en/group/eodir/chinese-youth-talent-program

chat.author: Benson Muite
chat.text: How many people from Africa participated? How does this differ from APAC participation?

chat.author: Tara Tarakiyee
chat.text: I understand there were calls for an online version, did you consider recording a webinar-type tutorial?

chat.author: Benson Muite
chat.text: Maybe something like https://carpentries-incubator.github.io/github-without-command-line/ could be useful

chat.author: Kaliya Young
chat.text: Here is a link to the research we completed with the support of Summer of Protocols (Now the Protocol Institute https://protocol-institute.org/about/)   https://identitywoman.net/ietf-research/
